description: This video discusses the FCC Incentive Auction, a case study on NP-hard problems, focusing on the reallocation of wireless spectrum in the U.S. The auction involved complex algorithms to manage scarce resources effectively.
topic_summary: The video explores the FCC Incentive Auction as a practical application of algorithms for NP-hard problems, emphasizing the historical context of spectrum allocation and the shift in usage from terrestrial television to mobile data [t=0:00-8:00].
